entry.title: New IDC AIDOAAI1500040 awarded to MACFADDEN & ASSOCIATES, INC. for the amount of $50,000

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF - IDIQ FOR SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE BUREAU OF DEMOCRACY, CONFLICT, AND HUMANITARIAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM (HASC).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL MANAGEMENT CONSULTING SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC AIDOAAI1500040 (10) awarded to MACFADDEN & ASSOCIATES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE HASC IDIQ CONTRACTING OFFICER'S REPRESENTATIVE (COR) FROM CAROLYN TROY TO TAYLOR STAGER, AND TO CHANGE THE ALTERNATE COR FROM TAYLOR STAGER TO CHEQUETTA WASHINGTON.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL MANAGEMENT CONSULTING SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC AIDOAAI1500040 (11) awarded to MACFADDEN & ASSOCIATES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCREASE THE IDIQ CEILING BY $190,393,659.00 FROM $300,000,000.00 TO $490,393,659.00.
